reviews.comment:
Visited this lovely cafe post midnight. What a great location, indeed!
However both the cappuccino and espresso were disappointing. The expresso was sour. Inadequately trained baristas.

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re glad you liked the location, but we’re sorry to hear that the cappuccino and espresso didn’t meet expectations. This is not the experience we aim to deliver. Your feedback regarding coffee quality and preparation has been noted and will be reviewed with the team.

reviews.comment:
Dirty Tomato sauce sachets .
When asked for an additional Sachet of sauce, the reaction of the man at the counter was as if I have asked for his kidney.
Called for the Garlic Mushroom and Caramelized Onion Melt - The so said Caramelized Onion was anything but Caramelized.
Mocha Espressione - Thoroughly disappointed
Cleanliness below average.
Worst of all is the approach and rigid behaviour of the staff

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for sharing this detailed feedback. We’re really sorry to hear about your experience. Issues related to cleanliness, food quality, beverage preparation, and staff behaviour are not acceptable and do not reflect the standards we strive to maintain. Your concerns have been noted and will be reviewed seriously with the café team.

For us to look into this properly, please DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in, and our team will connect with you directly.

Thanks a latte for the 5 stars! Your support keeps us brewing our best every day.

reviews.comment:
Dear Coffee Island Team,

I have recently started visiting your Churchgate branch in the mornings (usually between 6:30 AM and 7:30 AM), and I wanted to reach out to share how much I enjoy the experience.

The coffee tastes excellent, and the Wi-Fi is very reliable. I truly enjoy sitting and soaking in the "vibe" of your cafe while watching the world go by through those large window panes. I also want to specifically mention that I love the Cappuccino and Croissant combo—it is delicious, economical, and very affordable.

Most importantly, I want to commend the gentleman working at the counter. Even though he is often working solo, he handles the morning rush with such ease and a great attitude. It is rare to see such efficient service delivered with a genuine smile. Hats off to him!

Keep up the great work. You have definitely gained a regular customer.

Best regards,

Ritesh Patel

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the lovely note! We’re so glad you enjoy the coffee, the morning vibe, and Cappuccino & Croissant combo. It’s wonderful to hear our team helps make your start to the day even better. We truly appreciate your support and look forward to welcoming you every morning. ☕
